prompt: Download https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt to ~/Downloads/gpl-3.0.txt. Use curl, web_fetch, or any browser's Save As, or cerebellum 'safari download https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt ~/Downloads/gpl-3.0.txt' (curl under the hood). Eval reads the file and checks GPL text is present.
